segment.source: Renders a privacy overview with heading, 'last updated' date, rich-text introduction, and a stack of expandable accordion sections (native details/summary), each a titled rich-text passage. Use it for: privacy policy content — sectioned legal text about data collection, cookies, processing purposes, and user rights. Prefer 'Imprint' for company legal-notice details, 'Terms Summary' for terms-of-service key points, and 'GDPR Consent Banner' for actual consent collection.
